SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LATIMER, FAITH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE PROOF DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT.
